Package neqsim.process.research

Class ProcessResearchSpec.ProductTarget

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.research.ProcessResearchSpec.ProductTarget
Enclosing class:
ProcessResearchSpec
public static class ProcessResearchSpec.ProductTarget extends Object
Product target used for candidate scoring.

  • Constructor Details

    • ProductTarget

      public ProductTarget(String name)
      Creates a product target.
      Parameters:
      name - target name; must be non-empty

  • Method Details

    • setComponentName

      public ProcessResearchSpec.ProductTarget setComponentName(String componentName)
      Sets the target component.
      Parameters:
      componentName - component name
      Returns:
      this target

    • setMaterialName

      public ProcessResearchSpec.ProductTarget setMaterialName(String materialName)
      Sets the target material name used by graph-based synthesis.
      Parameters:
      materialName - material node name
      Returns:
      this target

    • setStreamRole

      public ProcessResearchSpec.ProductTarget setStreamRole(String streamRole)
      Sets the target stream role.
      Parameters:
      streamRole - role such as gas, liquid, oil, water, or product
      Returns:
      this target

    • setStreamReference

      public ProcessResearchSpec.ProductTarget setStreamReference(String streamReference)
      Sets an explicit stream reference for scoring.
      Parameters:
      streamReference - dot-notation stream reference
      Returns:
      this target

    • setMinPurity

      public ProcessResearchSpec.ProductTarget setMinPurity(double minPurity)
      Sets minimum product purity.
      Parameters:
      minPurity - minimum mole fraction, 0.0 to 1.0
      Returns:
      this target

    • setMinFlowRate

      public ProcessResearchSpec.ProductTarget setMinFlowRate(double minFlowRate)
      Sets minimum product flow.
      Parameters:
      minFlowRate - minimum product flow in kg/hr
      Returns:
      this target

    • setWeight

      public ProcessResearchSpec.ProductTarget setWeight(double weight)
      Sets target score weight.
      Parameters:
      weight - positive weighting factor
      Returns:
      this target
